title: Shaggy tan dog — deep clean refresh
description: This shaggy plush dog needed a full deep clean. We washed and refreshed the pile and ribbon so the toy is ready to go back on the shelf.
itemDetails: This tan shaggy dog plush with brown ribbon is a classic gift-plush dog style from mainstream retail lines in the 1990s onward. Ribbon-collar presentation is common in non-licensed plush intended for general gifting rather than character collecting. Construction generally uses long-pile polyester fabric, polyester stuffing, and stitched or safety eye details.
repairDetails: This tan shaggy dog with a brown ribbon needed a thorough refresh. We deep cleaned the pile and ribbon area so the plush looks and smells clean again. The after photos show the refreshed finish ready for display.
